name: SLB LIMITED/NV
business: SLB is an oilfield services company that provides technology and services to the global oil and gas industry. It operates through five divisions: Digital, Reservoir Performance, Well Construction, Production Systems, and All Other (which includes Data Center Solutions and carbon capture).

exposures.sentence: We increased deployment of AI solutions and the rapid expansion of our Data Center Solutions business.
This business is expanding rapidly as we strengthen strategic partnerships with hyperscalers to leverage our modular data center manufacturing capabilities.

The combined portfolio, technology capabilities and digital leadership positions SLB to create value for its customers and stakeholders by increasing its exposure to the growing production and recovery market.
strong sales of completions, artificial lift, and production chemicals.
The new company, SLB Capturi, combines technology portfolios, expertise, and operation platforms to support accelerated carbon capture adoption for industrial decarbonization at scale.

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend increase from $0.285 to $0.295 per share
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, SLB announced a 3.5% increase to its quarterly cash dividend from $0.285 per share of outstanding common stock to $0.295 per share, beginning with the dividend payable in April 2026.

catalysts.event: Commitment to return over $4 billion to shareholders in 2026
catalysts.sentence: we are committed to returning more than $4 billion to shareholders in 2026 through dividends and share repurchases.
